title: Circle rolls out USDC payments platform that lets users pay without holding stablecoins
message_html: Circle rolls out USDC payments platform that lets users pay without holding stablecoins ...
snippet: The platform allows PSPs, fintechs, and banks benefit from the efficiency of using stablecoins without having to hold USDC.
